data.title: RED: Tests for analyze-test-gate-log.sh phantom detection
data.description:
Create tests/scripts/test-analyze-test-gate-log.sh with RED tests for phantom mapping detection (SC2).

## Test Cases
- test_detects_phantom_python: audit log has source=foo.py method=fuzzy test=test_foo.py, but test_foo.py contains no import of foo — flagged as phantom
- test_passes_real_mapping_python: test_foo.py imports foo → not flagged
- test_detects_phantom_bash: test-bar.sh contains no source/call to bar.sh — flagged
- test_passes_real_mapping_bash: test-bar.sh sources bar.sh → not flagged
- test_empty_log_no_output: empty audit log → exit 0, no phantoms
- test_handles_renamed_files: log entry references deleted file → skipped (not flagged as phantom)

## Test Approach
Each test creates temp audit log fixtures and temp source/test files with controlled import relationships, then runs analyze-test-gate-log.sh and asserts exit code and stdout phantom reports.

## RED Marker
.test-index: plugins/dso/scripts/analyze-test-gate-log.sh: tests/scripts/test-analyze-test-gate-log.sh [test_detects_phantom_python]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-analyze-test-gate-log.sh
- [ ] At least 6 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-analyze-test-gate-log.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker exists
  Verify: grep -q "analyze-test-gate-log" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
